title: Support - Verify that data is correct after moving from Guest to Account not linked to any Tenant
scenario: Poly Lens Menu Support App data shows Tenant name/ID as None after switching from Guest to unlinked account
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Ensure you are logged in as a Guest (no account linked).
Navigate to Poly Lens Menu → Support → App.
Observe the displayed information: App version, Tenant name/ID, User ID, Last connected.
Note that App version is correct, Tenant name and Tenant ID are 'None', User ID is 'None', and Last connected is 'Unknown'.
Go back to the Home screen and log into an Account that is not linked to any Tenant.
After logging in, navigate again to Poly Lens Menu → Support → App.
expected: As Guest: App version is correct, Tenant name/ID and User ID are None, Last connected is Unknown. After logging into an unlinked account: Account information (e.g., email) is displayed, but Tenant name and Tenant ID are not present on the card.
